description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white and gray color palette. The front facade includes a large garage door, a sleek black privacy fence with a wooden accent, and a small landscaped area with vertical greenery. The structure is composed of multiple rectangular volumes, some of which are set back to create visual depth and private outdoor spaces. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with large panes on the front and smaller, more private openings on the sides and rear. The roof is mostly flat with a textured surface, and there are several covered and open terrace areas, including a pergola on one side. The overall appearance is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with clean lines, white and gray tones, and a mix of open and covered terraces. Features include a garage, privacy fence, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, black privacy fence with wood accent, main entrance, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the open green yard, pergola-covered terrace, and the stepped arrangement of the building volumes.
description_view_2: Back view displaying smaller windows, a rear entrance, and the flat roof sections with parapet walls.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the layered roof structure, solid white walls, and the transition between covered and open spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered windows
